creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 236083
patch

hda: add patch for Framework laptop v2 (Intel Gen 12th CPU) headphone jack.

It still uses Semiconductor 92HD95B, like in https://reviews.freebsd.org/D34596, but the ID is a bit different in this generation.

Tested on my Framework laptop v2 (Intel Gen 12th 1260p CPU) Batch 2.
